best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-statistics-003 title: access statistical pages with empty list module: statistics source pages: 3 preconditions: application is running. test data: - list of vowels: test steps: 1. launch the application. 2. click on "accesso pagina impostazioni". 3. click on "visualizza le impostazioni". 4. click on "modifica lista dei vocali". 5. change the list of vowels to: . 6. click on "accesso pagina statistiche". expected result: the system should display an error message indicating that the list of vowels cannot be empty.
